desc: single pair lockRows(0,1): row 0 holds col 0; row 1 blocked; row 2 (no lock with 0) allowed
two independent pairs lockRows(0,1) + lockRows(2,3): each pair isolated; row 2 can connect to col held by row 0
chain lockRows(0,1) + lockRows(1,2): row 0 holds col; row 1 blocked (direct lock); row 2 NOT blocked (no direct lock with row 0)
symmetric verify: lockRows(1,0) is identical to lockRows(0,1)
